restaurants.name: Taste of Kerala – Kovalam
restaurants.ambience: Outdoor and indoor dining; comfortable, beach-road setting; good for lunch or dinner with a view
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf

highlights: Good for meals with a view

restaurants.name: Santana Restaurant – Kovalam
restaurants.ambience: Beach-facing, casual yet stylish. Good for a relaxed meal at sunset
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf
highlights: Blend of coastal Kerala and North Indian cuisine

attractions.name: Kovalam Beach
attractions.description: A scenic crescent-shaped bay near Thiruvananthapuram, known for its iconic lighthouse, palm-fringed sands and peaceful coastal ambience
attractions.entry_fee: No general entry fee for the beach itself
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Kovalam Lighthouse
attractions.description: An iconic red-and-white striped lighthouse offering panoramic views of the Arabian Sea and Kovalam's crescent beaches
attractions.hours: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM and 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM (closed on Mondays)
attractions.entry_fee: ₹10 for adults, ₹3 for children, ₹20 for still camera, ₹25 for video camera
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Hawa Beach
attractions.description: A serene and less-crowded stretch of Kovalam known for its golden sands, gentle waves, and picturesque sunset views
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf
